extraction_reasoning: No litigation summary table is provided in the supplied risk section, so there are no against-versus-by rows to count and no criminal, regulatory, or tax proceedings to quantify; the narrative instead states that the Company, Promoters, Directors and Subsidiaries are currently not involved in legal proceedings. No contingent-liabilities table or stated total is disclosed, so no date-specific contingent-liabilities figure can be extracted. Company-wide customer concentration is disclosed for the full Fiscal 2025 using revenue from operations as the denominator: top five global institutions of higher education contributed 60.28% and top ten contributed 70.56%; these are not merely segment-level figures. The relevant financial tables use ₹ million, but no litigation or contingent-liabilities monetary table is present, so no conversion to crore is applicable.
